title: Video: Pak F-16s Escort JD Vance's Aircraft As He Arrives In Islamabad For Iran Talks
summary_full: Visuals showed five PAF F-16s escorting the US Air Force's Boeing C-32A plane in Pakistani airspace before it landed at Nur Khan airbase near Islamabad.
summary_public: Visuals showed five PAF F-16s escorting the US Air Force's Boeing C-32A plane in Pakistani airspace before it landed at Nur Khan airbase near Islamabad.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Arrives In Islamabad For Iran Talks
